contents: After a recent interigation, {a=Person_Ritikl}Ritikl{/} was medically diagnosed to be clinically insane. He was arrested after trying to rob £67 from an {a=Company_Ikea}Ikea{/}, with a chainsaw. During the interogation, he was repeatedly speaking to a figure that did not exist. He was also eating the table and complaining that it doesn't taste like cheese. Ritikl then exclaimed that his accomplice (the figure that did not exist) escaped the interigation room. He also alerted the detective that there were five of them, all dressed up like the power rangers. After the incident, he was sent to a psychiatric ward.

A new multiplayer VR game called {a=Media_KillJeffery}Kill Jeffery{/} has been released on the anniversery of Jeffery Epstein's suicide, starring {a=Person_Rick}Rick{/}. The objective of the game is to kill Jeffery Epstein and his accomplices on Epstein island. Collect various weapons and rip through all of those on his list.

{a=Person_Rick}Rick{/} releases a new A.I. powered robot simply called {a=Product_AIRick}A.I. Rick{/}. A.I. Rick is designed to bot look and behave like Rick whilst helping with household chores. Only one unit was manufactured and sold to {a=Person_Tokxi}Tokxi{/}. It immediatly stabbed {a=Person_JoeBeanie}Joe Beanie{/} 28 times in the torso and began playing {a=Media_CraigDatingSim}Craig Dating Simulator{/}.
Sightings of Nova's evil twin have been reported across the world. The first sighting was their tail in the sky, with the rest of them covered by the clouds. The second was their butt behind a bush.

{a=Person_Craig}Craig{/} received a spleen transplant from {a=Person_Ritikl}Doctor Ritikl{/}. Craig was so eager to show it off to the {a=Organisation_YMCA}YMCA{/}, he didn't realise that {a=Person_BillyTheAsshole}Billy The Asshole{/} knew what he did to their cousin. He chopped off their penis in battle. As Billy was trying to kill Craig, his emperor commanded them to stand down. After they refused, the emperor shot them dead with a handgun. Ritikl then gave them a penis transplant.

{a=Person_Tokxi}Tokxi{/} visited {a=Person_Ritikl}Doctor Ritikl{/} for their checkup they have every 3 years. During the checkup, Ritikl noticed that Tokxi has {a=Disease_Ligma}ligma{/} in his right arm. They deducted that the best cure was asorbic acid. Ritikl grabbed his carton of asorbic acid and proceeded to pour it all over Tokxi's arm. The arm was completely burnt off and the ligma was fully disintegrated. Tokxi later noted that "It felt funny."
